headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $124
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Michael Mueller   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $115 to $124.
